questions.q: Which one of the following is not a characteristic of animal kingdom?
What is the characteristic feature of the body of Acantharians (a type of Radiolaria)?
questions.answer: Presence of theca (a siliceous shell) around their body

questions.q: What is the function of the 'cerebral ganglion' in a starfish?
questions.answer: It acts as the central nervous system of starfish.

questions.q: Fill in the blank: The body of a sponge is made up of two main parts - a _______________________ and a _______________________ .
What is the term for the movement of cilia in a specific direction, such as the movement of sperm cells towards the ovum?
What is the primary function of the statocysts in echinoderms?
questions.answer: It helps in maintaining the balance and posture of the echinoderms.

questions.q: True/False: All chordates have a notochord at some stage of their life cycle.
What is the term for the process by which the animal body maintains homeostasis in the presence of changing external conditions?
Name two characteristics that distinguish animals from other living organisms.
What is the function of the siphonophore's (a type of cnidarian) siphosomal part?
questions.answer: It is used for capturing prey and bringing it to the mouth.
